授業の概要・背景:
Each week, (excluding weeks1-3) the class will be divided into 3 sections:
1. Grammar practice
2. Test practice.
3. Vocabulary practice

第1回: Students will be given a Homework pack based on TOEIC Parts 5, 6, and 7. They will work on this pack throughout the semester and hand it in on the last class.
